faqs.question: How much does centipede control cost in Lynbrook?
faqs.answer: Our centipede control services in Lynbrook range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Why do I have so many centipedes in my Lynbrook home?
faqs.answer: Centipedes are attracted to moisture and prey on other insects. Lynbrook's humid climate, especially during summer months, combined with damp basements, leaky pipes, or poor ventilation creates ideal conditions. They often enter through foundation cracks and gaps around doors and windows.

faqs.question: Are centipedes dangerous to my family and pets?
faqs.answer: While centipedes can bite if threatened, they are generally not dangerous to humans or pets. However, their presence indicates other pest issues and moisture problems. Their appearance can be alarming, and some people may experience minor allergic reactions to bites, making professional removal advisable.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate centipedes from my Lynbrook property?
faqs.answer: Most centipede infestations can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of initial treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 1-2 weeks as we address breeding areas, entry points, and underlying moisture issues. We offer follow-up visits to ensure your home remains centipede-free.
